name: Olga Vechtomova
sub_directions: Generative AI for creative content (text, art, music)
Computational models of creativity and aesthetic evaluation
Application of Large Language Models (LLMs) in artistic domains
Human-AI co-creation and interactive generative systems
Ethical considerations and bias in creative AI
recent_papers: Exploring Novelty and Coherence in AI-Generated Poetic Forms
Towards Explainable Creativity: Analyzing Latent Spaces of Generative Art Models
Interactive Story Generation with Large Language Models for Creative Writing
interest_paragraph: I am particularly drawn to Professor Vechtomova's work in computational models of creativity and the application of Large Language Models (LLMs) in artistic domains, as it aligns perfectly with my interest in pushing the boundaries of AI for creative expression. The prospect of contributing to research on human-AI co-creation and interactive generative systems, potentially utilizing frameworks like PyTorch and Hugging Face Transformers, is incredibly exciting to me.
